results.title: CPU Storms Into Regional Finals With Pair of Big Wins
results.description: Center Point-Urbana opened post-season play Thursday night, roaring past Garner-Hayfield-Ventura, 13-0 at home, then making the 264-mile round trip to Clear Lake, pulling off a wild 12-8 win over the Lions.

results.title: 'End of an era' for England - should a change of captain be next?
results.description: England would benefit from a change of captain, said Sky Sports Cricket's Simon Doull after the Test side were ruthlessly put to the sword by India at Lord's.

results.title: Ex-Kansas player Lagerald Vick charged with attempted murder - ESPN

results.title: Wood Ducks fall to Saints on the road 10-3
results.description: The Waldorf Wood Ducks baseball team took on the St. Peter Saints Friday, July 10, on the road in what was both a Region 12 and a River Valley West League game.
